heroTitle: CliffRise is a way to give something back to the cliffs that give us so much - with every purchase supporting the creation of new routes and the care of climbing areas in Bulgaria.
causeP1: It's very simple - by choosing Cliffrise magnesium or any of our other products, you support the development of climbing spots in Bulgaria and become part of something bigger.
causeP2: Your support is valuable and motivates us to keep moving forward.
aboutUsP1: United by their love for climbing and a desire to give something back to the community, Boiko Lalov and Alex Yanev began working together in 2020, developing the Peshterata (The Cave) crag near Ribaritsa. Shortly after, while establishing routes at Teteven/Zaslona, the idea for CliffRise was born.
aboutUsP2: United by their love for climbing and a desire to give something back to the community, Boiko Lalov and Alex Yanev began working together in 2020, developing the Peshterata (The Cave) crag near Ribaritsa. Shortly after, while establishing routes at Teteven/Zaslona, the idea for CliffRise was born.

eventsSection.normalTextOne: it was a weekend full of climbing, smiles, and time outdoors. Climbing during the day, yoga, and meeting cool people, sharing stories and ideas - all against the backdrop of beautiful Teteven. An event that showcased
eventsSection.boldedTextTwo: how strong and vibrant the climbing community is
eventsSection.normalTextTwo: and left a desire for this to be just the beginning.
